results.title: Willits leads long list of OU, OSU players taken on MLB draft’s 2nd day
results.description: Shortstop Jaxon Willits of Fort Cobb led a group of seven Oklahoma Sooners chosen on Sunday on the second day of the Major League Baseball draft.

results.title: Crigger set for second-straight all-star appearance
results.description: One of Corinth’s own will pitch on a big stage once again on Wednesday night.

results.title: Hayden reunites with ex-City teammate Springett at Leyton Orient
results.description: Former Norwich City loanee Isaac Hayden has signed for League One side Leyton Orient following the expiry of his contract at QPR.

results.title: Formula 1 will race with less power than Formula 2 at Spa
results.description: Spa is up next on the Formula 1 calendar, and caution is warranted as a painful experience awaits us thanks to the woeful 2026 V6 hybrid power units.

results.title: ‘All hell broke loose’: Herbert reveals toll of LIV Golf uncertainty, says he considered quitting
results.description: Ahead of this week’s Open Championships at Royal Birkdale, Australian golfer Lucas Herbert has opened up on a tumultuous year on the LIV Golf circuit.
